notableMoments: Qualified for the 2026 World Cup through UEFA Play-Off Path D, beating Ireland and Denmark both on penalties
Only previous World Cup appearance as Czechia was in 2006 in Germany, where they exited in the group stage despite beating the USA 3-0
As Czechoslovakia, reached the World Cup final twice: runners-up in 1934 (lost to Italy) and 1962 (lost to Brazil)
Czechoslovakia finished third at the 1962 World Cup and their 1934 team were one of the first great European sides
The Czech Republic's golden generation of the 2000s (Nedved, Rosicky, Cech, Baros, Koller) dominated European football but underachieved at World Cups
Euro 1996 runners-up as Czech Republic, losing the final to Germany via golden goal — their best result as an independent nation before the 2026 World Cup qualification
Ivan Hasek returned for a second stint as national team manager in 2024 and masterminded the play-off qualification campaign
The 2026 World Cup marks Czechia's return to the tournament for the first time in 20 years
